title: Overview of income in the e-MTA
text:
Overview of income in the e-MTA

You can get an overview of your annual income and use of basic exemption in the e-services environment e-MTA.

The service “My income” in the e-services environment provides an overview of who has made payments to you in 2025 and to what extent the basic exemption has been applied.

View “My income” 

You can view your income in the e-services environment e-MTA under the menu item Registers and inquiries – My inquiries – My income.

On the same page, you can also see your expected income tax liability calculated on the basis of the information available to the Estonian Tax and Customs Board. The final income tax liability is established after the submission of income tax return when all taxable income and tax incentives have been taken into account.

We will transfer the income data to your pre-filled income tax return of year 2025.

You can find more information on basic exemption on the webpage Calculation of basic exemption.

private client
